title: Пустынная странность | A desert oddity
description: This build is dedicated to greater detail of the desert and the world of Minecraft. Players will never get bored here, as there are adventures everywhere!
body:
Do you want to have an adventure or play your favorite game from a different perspective? Then this is the build for you! You are unlikely to get bored here! This build is dedicated to a desert game where the main character explores the world, but you can also play in the real world. There is no way you can log into the server from this build (unless the mod data is downloaded from it). The assembly is suitable for friends or a friendly company. Explore the world, dig and complete minecraft in a new way!

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

For full immersion, choose the world type "Single Biome" and then "Desert".

</details>
